layout.onRender: $count($all('config', 'dj-function', {'ID': 'dj-copilot'})) = 0 ? $notify('Please configure an AIApp function called dj-copilot in order to use the suggest feature')

properties.Suggest Table Descriptions: selected.($db := $read('config', 'dj-database', ID); $comment := $parseJson($call('dj-copilot', {'response_format': { 'properties': {'res': {'items': {'properties': {'table':{}, 'description':{}}}}} }, 'messages':[{'role':'user', 'content': 'Generate descriptions for the following tables in a database on "'&comment&'". The table names are: ' & $join($db.tables.*.name, ', ')}]}).choices.message.content).res; $ID := ID; $comment.($setIfAbsent('config', 'Table', $ID & '/' & table, {'comment': description})); $refresh())

properties.Suggest Column Descriptions: selected.($table := $read('config', 'Table', ID); $content := 'Generate very short descriptions for the columns of this table: ' & ($table.{name: {'description': comment, 'columns': properties.*.{'name': name, 'type': dbType, 'constraint': pkpos = 0 ? 'primary key' : (ref ? 'foreign key: ' & ref)}}} ~> $generateYaml); $comment := $parseJson($call('dj-copilot', {'response_format': { 'properties': {'res': {'items': {'properties': {'column':{}, 'description':{}}}}} }, 'messages':[{'role':'user', 'content': $content}]}).choices.message.content).res; $ID := ID; $comment.($setIfAbsent('config', 'Property', $ID & '/' & column, {'comment': description})); $refresh())
